evidenceSnippetOriginal: Students retain Intellectual Property ownership of their assignments, even when they have been submitted for assessment. Therefore, staff are not permitted to upload student work to an AI platform without their express consent.
evidenceLocator: Section: Generative AI FAQs - Can student assignments be uploaded to AI software?
